docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WARREN, DIANNE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA DMD, ANN-CATHERINE (DENTIST) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-21-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIANNE WARREN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANN-CATHERINE IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO TRIAL. APPEARANCE MUST BE MADE AT THE JUN-21-2019 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT COURT HEARING CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED APR-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA DMD, ANN-CATHERINE (DENTIST)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
